name: io.studiomeyer/crew
title: StudioMeyer Crew
description: Agent Personas for Claude. 10 MCP tools, 8 built-in personas (CEO, CFO, CMO, CTO, PM, Analyst, Support, Creative), 3 chained workflows. Zero extra API cost — runs within your Claude subscription. Magic Link email verification, no passwords. Free tier available. EU hosted (Frankfurt).
